DefiLlama Introduces Risk Scenario Planning Tool
> DefiLlama has launched risk scenario planning for Morpho vaults, mapping protocol dependencies and estimating users' maximum losses across potential failure points. Live now across 20 Morpho vaults.
👉
https://defillama.com/yields/pool/e0672197-9f3e-4414-bca5-e6b4c90aa469/risk
Source:
https://x.com/DefiLlama/status/2072796184725373108?s=20

tweet.text:
When you deposit into a vault, you're exposed to more than the vault itself: oracles, bridges, collateral, the sequencer, holders of vault roles.

Introducing risk scenario planning on DefiLlama.

* Maps every dependency that touches your deposit
* Models your max loss from each failure point
* Live now across 20 Morpho vaults

DefiLlama's Risk Scenario Planning tool
Maps every external dependency your deposit in a DeFi vault is exposed to (oracles, bridges, collateral tokens, sequencers, and role holders) and models the maximum potential loss from each failure point
It is currently live for 20 Morpho vaults, with interactive dashboards showing realistic loss scenarios, exit timelines, oracle exposure, smart contract risks
https://x.com/DefiLlama/status/2072796184725373108?s=20

TeraWulf Signs 20-Year Lease with Anthropic at Justified Data Campus in Hawesville, Kentucky

> A 20-year lease agreement with Anthropic at its Justified Data campus in Hawesville, Kentucky, expected to generate ~$19 billion of contracted revenue over the initial lease term.
> The sale of its 50.1% stake in the Abernathy Joint Venture to an investor group led by Fluidstack.

If You Want Taste, You're Gonna Have to Eat
> As AI has allowed more and more people to create things, the biggest differentiation, the biggest skill people are lacking, is taste itself.
> Taste is your ability to model out what people will like. It's curation versus consumption.
> Taste isn't consensus, not judgment first, either. Curiosity has to come first, then courage.
> If you want to be a good chef, you have to eat at people's restaurants.
> AI shifted the bottleneck from making to noticing. Ability is free. Attention is not.
> If the tools remove the attention, apprenticeship has to be reinvented around attention, and you have to put it back yourself.
Source:
https://x.com/jxnlco/status/2073819508729684462

Privacy in a World of Criminals - Zcash and its Accessories
> How Zcash is emerging as the cornerstone of a new privacy cycle, arguing its ZK-SNARK-based shielded pools, fair distribution, and growing anonymity set make it the only viable option for truly private digital cash, with a potential shift to PoS and ZSAs expanding its utility further.
👇
Source:
https://cryptopathic.substack.com/p/privacy-in-a-world-of-criminals

RIPPLE SECURES FULL MiCA CASP LICENSE IN LUXEMBOURG, BECOMING FULLY COMPLIANT TO OFFER REGULATED CRYPTO SERVICES ACROSS ALL 30 EEA COUNTRIES
SOURCE

Robotics startups are emerging from Southeast Asia, with Singapore at the centre
Southeast Asia's robotics ecosystem is gaining significant momentum, with Singapore serving as its central hub for practical tech deployment and major funding milestones like dConstruct's $125 million Series A
https://www.asiatechreview.com/p/robotics-startups-are-emerging-from

The Sick Man of Private Markets
Following the Global Financial Crisis, the private equity industry successfully reformed its misaligned incentives by introducing fee step-downs and stronger co-investment rights
VC's megafunds now face similar performance issues driven by an unhealthy focus on fund scale, making a shift toward these disciplined private equity structures necessary to improve returns for investors
https://blog.joinodin.com/p/the-sick-man-of-private-markets

Privacy in a World of Criminals
Zcash serves as an open-source, private digital cash protocol utilizing ZKPs to protect financial data from surveillance capitalism, and its eco is expanding through cross-chain infra and privacy assets
While regulatory pressures persist, the adoption of these post-quantum secure protocols enables sovereign individual privacy against both corporate data harvesting and state overreach
https://cryptopathic.substack.com/p/privacy-in-a-world-of-criminals

The Extremely Lean Chain
Vitalik's proposal introduces a design for Ethereum that cuts down the amount of data individual validators must store by making them generate daily cryptographic proofs of their own status and balances
By offloading this bookkeeping data directly to the participants, the network can run much more efficiently and potentially scale to handle millions of validators while adding stronger privacy features
https://ethresear.ch/t/the-extremely-lean-chain/25369

Jeff Bezos Held 60 Meetings To Secure Amazon Investors But 40 Declined His Offer Of $50K For 1% Ownership — Today, That Would Be Worth $25B
"I had to take 60 meetings," Bezos said. "Roughly 40 of them said no and a little 20, 22 or so said yes."
He called the fundraising process "the hardest thing I've ever done."
https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/jeff-bezos-held-60-meetings-183108743.html

Vitalik: The Extremely Lean Chain
> Vitalik proposes validators ZK-prove their own state periodically instead of the chain tracking it continuously, reducing persistent per-validator onchain state to just 6 bytes and eliminating costly epoch processing. The advanced design also introduces daily validator re-anonymization.
Source:
https://ethresear.ch/t/the-extremely-lean-chain/25369/1
